plot outline: In the sequel to DreamWorks Animation's Oscar®-nominated blockbuster comedy, the Templeton brothers--Tim (James Marsden, X-Men franchise) and his Boss Baby little bro Ted (Alec Baldwin)--have become adults and drifted away from each other. Tim is now a married stay-at-home dad. Ted is a hedge fund CEO. But a new boss baby with a cutting-edge approach and a can-do attitude is about to bring them together again.. and inspire a new family business.
title: The Boss Baby 2: Family Business
akas: Un Jefe En Pañales 2: Negocios De Familia (United States, Spanish title)
The Boss Baby 2: Family Business (United States, English title)
The Boss Baby 2: Family Business (Japan, English title)
The Boss Baby 2: Family Business (Pakistan, English title)
